governance.board_oversight: Climate is not on the board agenda; the board provides no formal climate review
governance.management_role: Sustainability is handled by an EHS analyst who reports to plant operations

strategy.scenario_analysis: No scenario analysis performed; 2C scenario not analyzed

ghg_inventory.notes: Scope 2 market-based only — location-based not reported
ghg_inventory.scope_3: Scope 3 not measured; categories not disclosed; methodology N/A
ghg_inventory.third_party_assurance: No third-party verification; self-reported, not verified

targets.sbti: Not committed to SBTi; targets to be set in future
targets.claims: Company plans to achieve net-zero by 2060 via offsets only
